sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khialhan a nei gimna thuak mi ka hi,
Vantung lam ka et leh ka tung nuam hi;
Hih hang tua
sungah khial nei om thei kei,
Hih hang, “Hong pai in” cih aw khat ka
thei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nisim ka pai lai vantung khua lampi,
A tawntung mawhna khialhna’n hong
khem hi;
Hih hang “Pulak in, na kisikkik leh,
Mawh kiphel ngah ding” cih thu ka thei
hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kihhuai mi ka hih ciangin bang ci-in,
Tua khua siangtho sungah ka lut ding
hiam?
Pasian tokhom mai-ah ding thei ding hiam?
Hih hang, “Hong nai in” khut tawh hong
sam hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh Topa a aw, ke’n ka za hi,
Ama khut in kei hong naisak thei
hi;
Ama si in ka mawhna ka khialhna,
Hong phel thei vantungah hong
lutsakta.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Topa aw ka hong thuumna hong ngai in,
Na hehpihna kei ading kicing;
Na
linglukhu in kei kumpi lukhu,
Ka nuntakna ding Nang nunna Nong pia.

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Neihsa bangmah
nei keng, Nang kong puak ding,
Ka lungsim pumpi’n Nang kong kipia khin;
Ka lungsim teng bang
ci’n kong pia thei diam,
Mawh phelna ding thu’n ka lung hong nuamsak.
